description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a bold color scheme of red, black, and white. The shoes have a rounded toe box in red, with black side panels and a white mesh accent near the laces. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black laces, and there is a prominent white strap across the tongue area, printed with text and a logo. The heel area is black with a glossy black logo, and the interior lining is red. The sole is white and appears to be made of rubber, providing a contrast to the upper materials. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for casual or urban wear.
description: A pair of modern, low-top athletic sneakers in red, black, and white with a criss-cross lacing system and a prominent branded strap. The shoes feature a white rubber sole and mesh accents for breathability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded red toe boxes, black laces, and white branded straps across the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black side panels, white mesh accents, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel sections with glossy black logos and the red interior lining.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black and red color blocking and mesh details.
attribute_logo: Glossy black emblem on the heel and printed logo on the white strap across the tongue.
